decisions.title: Secret redaction architecture
decisions.consequences: Single point to maintain, audit, and test. Requires all 6 binaries to depend on it.

decisions.title: Daemon IPC authentication
decisions.consequences: Prevents local lateral movement by non-privileged users.

decisions.title: MCP tool rate limiting strategy
decisions.consequences: Granular control per capability. More configuration surface.

decisions.title: Automated dependency update tool
decisions.consequences: Simpler setup for Rust. GitHub-native. Fewer config options than Renovate.
